ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size entry */,
  "size" REAL /* Standard shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* EU shoe size equivalent */,
  "kr_size" REAL /* South Korean shoe size equivalent */,
  "jp_size" REAL /* Japanese shoe size equivalent */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size equivalent */,
  "cn_size" REAL /* Chinese shoe size equivalent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the size entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size in the shoe_sizes table */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the shoe */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shoes available in stock for this size */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse holding this inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold at which an inventory reorder is triggered */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES shoe_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_location FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_location") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "shoe_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the shoe style */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand associated with the shoe style */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the shoe (e.g., sneakers, boots) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shoe style */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the shoe */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the style is intended for */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the shoe style (active or discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe style sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total sale price for the transaction */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Order ID associated with the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES shoe_styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse in terms of inventory */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the warehouse */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the warehouse (active or inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, sales representative) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active or inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_rules" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion rule */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID from which conversion is made */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID to which conversion is made */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor used for converting size */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the conversion rule is effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_rules_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_rules_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was a rollback of a previous change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_audit_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shoe size being reported on */,
  "total_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of units sold for this size */,
  "total_inventory" INTEGER /* Total inventory available for this size */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the report */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Trend analysis of sales over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)
